news.t: Tema ETFs Exceeds $5bn in AUM After Three Years
Tema ETFs Surpasses $2 Billion in AUM in Under Three Years
Tema Appoints ETF Industry Leader Steve Munroe as President
Tema Surpasses $1bn AUM Two Years After Launch, Strengthens Team With Key Growth Hires
Tema Launches the S&P 500 Historical Weight ETF Strategy (DSPY), First S&P 500 Concentration Innovation Since 2003

holdings.infoBox: DSPY is an equity ETF with a total of 505 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 4.12%, Apple at 3.37%, Micron Technology at 2.21%, Amazon.com at 2.07%, and Broadcom at 1.86%.

overview.description: The Tema S&P 500 Historical Weight ETF Strategy (DSPY) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund is actively managed, investing in the securities of the S&P 500 index while utilizing a weight-adjusted methodology. It aims to create a portfolio reflecting the indexs average concentration levels since 1989 through historical weightings. DSPY was launched on Apr 1, 2025 and is issued by Tema.
